description: A policy research organization needs to analyze the global distribution of major populated places across countries. Using the Natural Earth datasets for country boundaries (~/GIS_Data/natural_earth/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp) and populated places (~/GIS_Data/natural_earth/ne_110m_populated_places.shp), calculate the number of populated places within each country. The resulting layer must include a field named 'NUMPOINTS' containing the count for each country. Export the final dataset as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/countries_with_place_count.geojson.
